title: Design System: SCM Dashboard Global Next

metric.purpose: KPI / Stat values — the loudest element on any screen; tabular numerals.

code.purpose: Real machine identifiers only (SKU, lot, BL).

shadows.name: panel
shadows.purpose: Resting lift on .panel surfaces (the single card look).

motion.name: rise
motion.purpose: Single page-load entrance; gated behind prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single most important action on a surface. Rare by design.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display:inline-flex; min-height:2.25rem; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:0.5rem; border-radius:0.5rem; padding:0 0.75rem; font-size:0.875rem; font-weight:500; color:var(--color-on-brand); background:var(--color-brand); box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgb(15 23 42 / 0.08); border:none; cursor:pointer; transition:background .15s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background:var(--color-brand-press); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline:2px solid var(--color-brand); outline-offset:2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display:inline-flex; min-height:2.25rem; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:0.5rem; border-radius:0.5rem; padding:0 0.75rem; font-size:0.875rem; font-weight:500; color:var(--color-ink); background:var(--color-surface); border:1px solid var(--color-line); cursor:pointer; transition:background .15s; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background:var(--color-sunken); }

components.name: Panel
components.description: The single source of the card look. Never nested.
components.css: .ds-panel { background:var(--color-surface); border:1px solid var(--color-line); border-radius:0.75rem; box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgb(15 23 42 / 0.06); padding:1.25rem; } .ds-eyebrow { font-size:0.6875rem; font-weight:600; letter-spacing:0.08em; color:var(--color-brand); margin:0; }

components.name: Search Field
components.css: .ds-field { min-height:2.25rem; width:100%; box-sizing:border-box; border-radius:0.5rem; border:1px solid var(--color-line); background:var(--color-surface); padding:0 0.75rem; font-size:0.875rem; color:var(--color-ink); box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgb(15 23 42 / 0.05); } .ds-field::placeholder { color:var(--color-faint); } .ds-field:focus-visible { border-color:var(--color-brand); box-shadow:0 0 0 2px rgb(37 99 235 / 0.25); outline:none; }

components.name: Status Pill
components.description: Color-as-meaning state chip; leading dot reinforces state. Variants swap the soft/ink pair (ok/warn/danger/brand/neutral).
components.css: .ds-pill { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:0.375rem; border-radius:9999px; padding:0.125rem 0.625rem; font-size:0.75rem; font-weight:600; } .ds-pill-dot { width:0.375rem; height:0.375rem; border-radius:9999px; background:currentColor; opacity:.7; } .ds-pill-ok { background:var(--color-ok-soft); color:var(--color-ok-ink); }

components.name: Segmented Selector
components.description: Outbound-type / warehouse switch. Selected = brand fill; idle = bordered neutral.
components.css: .ds-seg { display:inline-flex; min-height:2.25rem; align-items:center; justify-content:center; border-radius:0.5rem; padding:0 0.75rem; font-size:0.875rem; font-weight:500; cursor:pointer; transition:background .15s,border-color .15s; } .ds-seg-on { border:1px solid var(--color-brand); background:var(--color-brand); color:var(--color-on-brand); box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgb(15 23 42 / 0.08); } .ds-seg-off { border:1px solid var(--color-line); background:var(--color-surface); color:var(--color-muted); } .ds-seg-off:hover { border-color:var(--color-line-strong); color:var(--color-ink); }

narrative.overview: A quiet, number-first workbench for internal Boosters supply-chain operators. Light-first and read-heavy: operators scan lot/stock tables, upload request files, confirm FEFO allocation, export WMS files, and read settlement marts. It behaves like a well-made instrument — legible numbers, clear status, calm surfaces — never like a marketing site. A portal blue accent sits over a near-neutral slate/gray canvas (hex, not OKLCH); color is rationed so the numbers lead.
keyCharacteristics: Light-first (dark-theme tokens exist but are dormant).
Numbers are the content: tabular numerals, strong weight, generous size.
One blue accent + a three-state status triad; neutrals never compete.
Flush data ledgers (AG Grid Quartz) with all columns left-aligned.
One subtle page-load entrance; reduced-motion safe.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Portal blue marks the single most important action or state on a surface; if two things are blue, one is wrong.

rules.name: The Status-Is-Meaning Rule
rules.body: Green/amber/red appear only to communicate allocation or settlement state, always alongside a label or icon, never color alone.

rules.name: The Numbers-Lead Rule
rules.body: Quantities always use tabular numerals and the strongest weight on their row; labels stay small and tinted.

rules.name: The No-Nested-Panels Rule
rules.body: .panel is the single source of the card look; never put a panel inside a panel.

rules.name: The Flush-Ledger Rule
rules.body: Data tables render edge-to-edge inside their panel — no wrapper frame, no zebra stripes — with all columns left-aligned.

dos: Do give every quantity tabular numerals and the strongest weight on its row.
Do keep portal blue (#2563eb) to one action/state per surface.
Do use ok/warn/danger only for real allocation/settlement state, paired with a label or icon.
Do render tables flush inside a single .panel, all columns left-aligned, row rules only.
Do bump body text toward ink for >=4.5:1 contrast (incl. placeholders); large/bold >=3:1.
Do ship one subtle rise entrance, gated behind prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference.
donts: Don't nest .panel inside .panel, or build evenly-sized identical card grids.
Don't use generic slate-on-white admin-template styling or Inter/system-default type.
Don't use purple-blue gradients, gradient text, glassmorphism, or side-stripe (border-left) accents.
Don't ship dark mode with glowing accents (dark tokens are dormant; the product is light-first).
Don't right-align numeric grid columns (override to left) or add zebra striping to the ledger.
Don't let color be the only signal for a decision, or let a label out-weight its number.
